Off Calendar Mar-13-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Case Consolidated with Case No. CGC-16-551432. No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The Court orders the balance of this case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-16-551432 WITH CASE CGC-16-551383
Off Calendar Dec-14-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Matthew Lee of Clapp, Moroney, Vucinich, Beeman & Scheley telephone number 650-989-5400 for Defendants NC Flooring Group, Inc. and Freeman Construction Company.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS NC FLOORING GROUP, INC. AND FREEMAN CONSTRUCTION COMPANY'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-16-551432 WITH CASE CGC-16-551383 is granted. The cases are consolidated for all purposes. This case is the lead case and all further filings must be in this case only. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
